name: coordination
canonical_statement: Coordination is recoverable differentiated compatibility under recursive burden.

interpretation.recoverable: Compatibility remains sufficiently preservable or restorable under admissible dynamics.
interpretation.differentiated: Coordination does not require symmetry, uniformity, or identity.
interpretation.compatibility: Interacting structures remain mutually survivable across accessibility dynamics.
interpretation.recursive_burden: Coordination persists under accumulated transport, constraint, and accessibility compression pressures.

deep_compression: Persistent systems increasingly favor recoverable coordination structure.
